Node started: Test the possibility of k(n)=2. This requires checking if 2023 divides 2^a + 2^b for some integers a, b. Specifically, check if 2023 divides 2^m + 1 for some m. If k(n)=2 is impossible, investigate if k(n)=3 is possible.
